overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exploring a vibrant neon-lit nightclub. The player circles a central stage with holographic dancers, moves through the crowded dance floor past various NPCs including Johnny Silverhand, and the clip ends with a brief exterior shot of an Asian-inspired building at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dance stage with central holographic display

events.description: begins circling clockwise around the central holographic pillar to observe dancers from different angles
lighting shifts from magenta-pink to cyan-blue dominant tones as camera moves to opposite side of pillar

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular stage observing the choreographed dancers and central holographic display

notable_agents.action: female dancer in red and black bodysuit performing synchronized dance routine
female dancer in white outfit performing choreographed movements near the pillar

entered.detail: tall cylindrical transparent display with scrolling cyan and magenta digital patterns and glowing base
raised circular platform with reflective dark flooring and integrated neon edge lighting
array of pink and blue theatrical spotlights mounted on ceiling trusses
linear cyan LED strips embedded in safety railings around the stage perimeter
dimly lit background seating area with neon accent lighting and silhouetted patrons

segments.scene_description: The player stands on a circular stage in a cyberpunk nightclub, circling a massive central holographic pillar displaying shifting digital patterns. Dancers in futuristic outfits perform choreographed routines under vibrant pink and cyan neon spotlights while the camera moves around the perimeter, revealing the bar area in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded nightclub floor with dancing patrons

events.description: steps off the circular stage platform into the main crowd area of the nightclub
approaches Johnny Silverhand character dancing energetically in the crowd

agents.ego_description: moving through the crowded dance floor, navigating between dancing NPCs and approaching Johnny Silverhand

notable_agents.action: man in pink suit with loosened tie waving enthusiastically at the camera
Johnny Silverhand character in black leather jacket and sunglasses dancing with energetic arm movements

entered.detail: structural support pillars with integrated vertical cyan neon light strips
long dark bar with illuminated countertop and bottles visible behind

segments.scene_description: Moving off the stage into the dense crowd, the player navigates through dancing NPCs in the neon-lit nightclub. A man in a pink suit waves from the left as the camera approaches Johnny Silverhand dancing energetically near the bar area, surrounded by architectural columns glowing with cyan neon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior of Asian-inspired commercial building at night

events.description: abrupt cut from interior nightclub to exterior urban environment showing building facade

agents.ego_description: stationary view looking up at the building facade and signage

entered.detail: multi-story building with traditional curved roof elements and modern cyberpunk additions
illuminated red spherical traditional lanterns hanging from the building exterior
illuminated red spherical traditional lanterns hanging from the building exterior
glowing red neon signs and illuminated billboards on the building upper floors

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly transitions to an exterior night view of an Asian-inspired building adorned with glowing red paper lanterns and neon signage. The camera looks up at the multi-story facade featuring traditional architectural elements mixed with cyberpunk neon lighting, with no crowd present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the high-energy interior of a neon-lit nightclub to a quiet, traditional exterior at night. It begins on a circular stage, circling a massive holographic pillar of shifting digital patterns while dancers perform under vibrant pink and cyan spotlights. As the camera moves off the stage and into the dense crowd, it navigates past dancing NPCs and a man in a pink suit before approaching Johnny Silverhand near glowing cyan architectural columns. The scene then shifts abruptly from the crowded club to an exterior view of an Asian-inspired building adorned with glowing red paper lanterns and neon signage. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal the multi-story facade where traditional architectural elements blend with cyberpunk lighting under a dark night sky.
